title: CrystalcraftPBR
description: PBR textures for the Crystalcraft Unlimited mod
body:
## CrystalcraftPBR
This texture pack adds **normal** and **specular maps** according to the LabPBR 1.3 standard to the textures of the [Crystalcraft Unlimited mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crystalcraft-unlimited). This means that the textures have **depth** and **reflections**. If you are looking for emissive textures like glowing ores, feel free to try [this other resource pack of mine](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/crystalcraft-glowing).
## Completeness
<details>
  <summary>Normal maps</summary>
  
  * Blocks: 100%
  * Entities: 100%
  * Items: 100%
  * Armor: 100%
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Specular maps</summary>
  
  * Blocks: 5%
  * Entities: 100%
  * Items: 3%
  * Armor: 20%
</details>

## How to use
1. Download this texture pack and put it in the “resourcepacks” folder.
2. Install [Iris](https://www.irisshaders.dev/download) (recommended) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
3. Download a shader, that supports the LabPBR 1.3 standard (examples below) and put it in the “shaderpacks” folder of your Minecraft instance.
4. Activate all recommended PBR options in the shader settings.

<details>
  <summary>Recommended shader settings</summary>
<details>
  <summary>AstraLex</summary>
    
    - Advanced Materials > Parallax > Parallax Occlusion Mapping: ON
    - Advanced Materials > Parallax > Self Shadows: ON
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Bliss</summary>
    
    - Resource Pack Support > Material Ambient Occlusion: On
    - Resource Pack Support > Specular Reflections > Specular Reflections: On
    - Resource Pack Support > Specular Reflections > Screen-Space Reflections: On
    - Resource Pack Support > Emissive: Hardcoded + Lab Emission
    - Resource Pack Support > Sub-Surface Scattering > Mode: Hardcoded + LabSSS
    - Resource Pack Support > Parallax Occlusion Mapping / POM > Parallax Occlusion Mapping: On
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Bloop</summary>
    
    - PBR > LabPBR Maps: On
    - PBR > Screen Space Reflections: Accurate Reflections
    - PBR > PBR for Translucent Blocks: On
    - PBR > Hardcoded Metals: On
    - PBR > POM: On
    - PBR > Advanced Settings > Pixel Pack: On
</details>
<details>
  <summary>BSL</summary>
    
    - Material > Advanced Materials: ON
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Complementary</summary>
    
    - RP Support: labPBR (RP Required)
</details>
  <details>
<summary>Insanity</summary>
    
    - Advanced Options > Material & Reflections > Material Format*: labPBR 1.3
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Kappa</summary>

    - Lighting > Indirect Light > Emission Mode: Hardcoded + labPBR
    - Terrain > Vertex Attribute Fix: ON
    - Terrain > Parallax Occlusion Mapping > Enabled: ON
    - Terrain > Parallax Occlusion Mapping > Slope Normal Calculation: On
    - Terrain > Reflections > Resourcepack Reflections: ON
    - Terrain > Reflections > Reflection Capture: On
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Lux</summary>
    
    - Surface Settings > Material Support: On
    - Surface Settings > Material Normal Config > Parallax Occlusion Mapping: On
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Noble</summary>
    
    - Terrain > POM > POM: Steep
    - Terrain > POM > Layers: 128
    - Terrain > POM > Shadowing: ON
</details>
<details>
  <summary>photon</summary>
    
    - Materials > Normal Mapping: ON
    - Materials > Specular Mapping: ON
    - Materials > Parallax Occlusion Mapping: ON
    - Materials > Resource Pack Settings > Parallax Samples: 60
    - Materials > Resource Pack Settings > POM Self-Shadowing: ON
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Shrimple</summary>
    
    - Materials > Normal Map: Lab-PBR
    - Materials > Specular Map: Lab-PBR
    - Materials > Emission: Lab-PBR
    - Materials > Porosity: Lab-PBR
    - Materials > SSS: Lab-PBR
    - Materials > Occlusion: Lab-PBR
    - Materials > Displacement > Type: POM
    - Materials > Displacement > Parallax Options > POM Samples: 48
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Solas</summary>
    
    - Resourcepack PBR > RPPBR > Resourcepack PBR: On
    - Resourcepack PBR > RPPBR > Parallax Occlusion Mapping*: On
    - Resourcepack PBR > RPPBR > Self Shadows*: On
</details>
<details>
  <summary>superDuperVanilla</summary>

    - PBR > PBR mode: Lab PBR 1.3
    - PBR > Slope normals: On
    - PBR > Parallax occlusion settings > Parallax occlusion: On
</details>
</details>

Some parts of some textures that are based on vanilla textures are based of the [SPBR resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spbr).
